title: Update Zombie Horse
description: Updates the old Zombie Horse texture from snapshot 25w41a (1.21.11)
body:
**Update Zombie Horse** - resource pack that changes the old model of the zombie horse, making it more pleasant and beautiful. Now the zombie horse will become a little creepy.

The model of the zombie horse have been updated in snapshot 25w41a (1.21.11)

![Zombie Horse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1657602c3d9b99a8c217c902eadf6f57d3af8883.png)
